gist.headline: Crunching the numbers
gist.blurb: BhaskarMath just landed in the community showcase. Whether you're wrestling with algebra or conquering calculus, this new app brings step-by-step math solutions straight to the hive.
gist.summary: Added BhaskarMath to the community apps showcase, introducing a new educational tool for math lessons and practice problems.
gist.impact: Learners can now discover BhaskarMath in our ecosystem to get step-by-step help with algebra, calculus, and geometry.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee as a math professor with tiny glasses, teaching math to the Nomnom creature. A chalkboard or retro monitor showing calculus symbols. Represents the addition of the BhaskarMath educational app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny professor glasses, pointing at a retro chalkboard filled with math equations. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a pixelated pi symbol. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
